title: Venice, Florida: Shark Teeth, Historic Charm & Gulf Sunsets
excerpt: Just a short drive from Fort Myers, Venice delivers fossil-packed beaches, a walkable downtown, and stunning Gulf sunsets that will make you plan a second trip.
